title: turnera hilaireana var. oblongifolia
intro: Turnera hilaireana var. oblongifolia, commonly known as the Mexican prickly poppy or Turnera, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Turneraceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for wound healing and soothing skin irritations. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation. The herbal preparations of Turnera hilaireana var. oblongifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
